nodes.label: Whisper works on at least some ROCm 6.4 paths
General HIP / PyTorch math appears broadly functional
LLM token processing can be very slow
CFG=1.0 materially improves diffusion throughput in at least one report
Vulkan can match or beat ROCm in some tested cases
ROCm containers share the host kernel/driver
KFD reset / doorbell instability has affected Polaris under compute load
MIOpen convolution/kernel selection is primary suspect for diffusion noise
LLM slowness is likely fallback GEMM / poor occupancy / launch geometry
There is a kernel-version compatibility boundary for KFD stability
First corrupted tensor/layer in diffusion path
Safe precision matrix by workload (fp32 / fp16 / mixed)
Best raw HIP GEMM tile families for gfx803
Why MIOpen perfdb/search gives 2.6 s/it vs 7 s/it swings
Recompiled rocBLAS for gfx803 on ROCm 6.x
Issue #10 ROCm 6.4 and 5.7 issues on Linux
Rosenbusch-style repo documents gfx803 Docker flows for Ollama, ComfyUI, WhisperX
Official pip/ROCm Docker builds do not compile PyTorch stack for Polaris/gfx803; recompilation is needed
On ROCm 6.x, Ollama path may require recompiling rocBLAS for gfx803
Best baseline stack to pin first (5.7 vs 6.4, stock vs patched)
Required flags/settings per workload (--lowvram, MIOPEN_LOG_LEVEL, CFG tricks, etc.)
WorkGroupMappingType: A and WorkGroupMapping: 0 improves Tensile stability/speed on Linux
MIOPEN_FIND_ENFORCE=3 and MIOPEN_DEBUG_DISABLE_FIND_DB=1 initially lowered diffusion config to 2.5s/it but was unstable later
AssertAIGreaterThanEqual in Tensile yaml can safely be removed/ignored if checking AI fails build
--fp8_e5m2-text-enc reduces ComfyUI VRAM usage on rx580, bypassing --lowvram need
Vulkan is tested and working on the current host (kernel 6.19)
Vulkan implementations (e.g. Vulkan-based diffusers) can serve as numerical ground truth
Direct tensor parity comparison: Vulkan vs ROCm/Docker
Vulkan Comparison Branch (Active Call for Testers)
sd.cpp builds successfully with Vulkan backend using Nix (GCC 15)
stable-diffusion.cpp builds successfully with GCC 15 via Nix
Nix-built Vulkan binaries hit IncompatibleDriverError querying host radv drivers
nixGL or nix-ld is required to bridge Nix vulkan-loader and host /usr/lib/libvulkan_radeon.so
